problem_hypothesis: Specification and cost decisions are re-entered or detached from job execution
minimum_scope: One product family locked specification cost components PDF quote job card proof version and due status
explicit_exclusions: Accounting automatic pricing compliance claims and full ERP
baseline_metric: Quote time correction count and status calls
success_signal: Lower correction or lookup effort across five live jobs
stop_rule: Stop if duplicate entry exceeds current work or role ownership is unclear
privacy_risk: Low if all jobs are synthetic or anonymized
next_action: Validate with owner estimator and floor user

problem_hypothesis: Wrong version and hidden stage aging cause preventable rework or delay
minimum_scope: Approved-version reference five production states blocker owner and aging
explicit_exclusions: Artwork storage customer portal and machine integration
baseline_metric: Approval confusion rework and overdue-stage count
success_signal: One prevented version error or earlier blocker action
stop_rule: Stop if approved source cannot be reliably identified
privacy_risk: Medium if artwork is stored; avoid storage in first test
next_action: Use dummy file references in prototype

problem_hypothesis: Unstructured exceptions and missing proof increase calls and billing lag
minimum_scope: Manifest import five statuses reason codes POD reference aging and billing-ready flag
explicit_exclusions: Route optimization continuous tracking surveillance and automated messaging
baseline_metric: Where-is-it calls failed attempts and POD-to-invoice days
success_signal: Reduced status calls or proof aging on one route
stop_rule: Stop if driver update is unsafe or billing rejects evidence
privacy_risk: Medium due to location and recipient data
next_action: Prototype with synthetic routes and minimal fields

problem_hypothesis: Failed attempts are not converted into clear next actions
minimum_scope: Reason code custodian next action due time and closure outcome
explicit_exclusions: Customer profiling automatic retry and route scoring
baseline_metric: Open failed attempts and repeat attempts
success_signal: Faster closure and fewer repeated unclear reasons
stop_rule: Stop if reason taxonomy is not used consistently

problem_hypothesis: Approval and material blockers are discovered at line start
minimum_scope: Style revision approval BOM material gates planned line date blocker and owner
explicit_exclusions: Worker-level efficiency payroll buyer portal and production ERP
baseline_metric: Late line starts and readiness-check time
success_signal: One blocker found before cutting or line setup
stop_rule: Stop if authoritative approval or material state is unavailable
privacy_risk: Low at style level with anonymous buyer

problem_hypothesis: Size-color shortages emerge too late for shipment decisions
minimum_scope: Order ratio packed balance shortage reason owner and release state
explicit_exclusions: Consumer returns worker scoring and shipment documentation automation
success_signal: Earlier shortage decision on two live orders
stop_rule: Stop if bundle or SKU identity is unreliable
privacy_risk: Low if buyer and order IDs are anonymized

problem_hypothesis: Jobs are released despite missing revision material tool or quality gates
minimum_scope: One product family work order revision four readiness gates blocker owner next operation and aging
explicit_exclusions: MRP finite scheduling OEE costing and machine integration
baseline_metric: Search time premature releases and hold aging
success_signal: Ten work orders located and released with less coordination time
stop_rule: Stop if master data cannot identify revision and order reliably
privacy_risk: Low with anonymous parts and quantities
next_action: Select one process and reconstruct three orders

problem_hypothesis: Finished goods wait because inspection documents quantity or billing prerequisites are unclear
minimum_scope: Order accepted quantity required documents blocker owner and invoice-ready state
explicit_exclusions: Quality compliance automation and accounting replacement
success_signal: Earlier resolution of one recurring hold
stop_rule: Stop if legal or quality release is simplified incorrectly

problem_hypothesis: Stockout negative stock and dead stock are hidden inside POS reports
minimum_scope: One category below-minimum negative-stock no-sale-aging receiving mismatch and action owner
explicit_exclusions: POS replacement automatic ordering dynamic pricing and customer profiling
baseline_metric: Stockout searches discrepancies and no-sale aging
success_signal: Actions completed and fewer repeated discrepancies over four weeks
stop_rule: Stop if SKU and unit identity fail the twenty-item check

problem_hypothesis: Partial lines and substitutions become invisible after initial billing
minimum_scope: Anonymous customer class order line allocated delivered balance promise and owner
explicit_exclusions: Credit scoring automated outreach and invoice generation
success_signal: Fewer forgotten balances across ten orders
stop_rule: Stop if current order system already provides reliable balance visibility
privacy_risk: Medium if customer identities are retained; use anonymous IDs
next_action: Reconstruct one full one partial and one overdue order
